name: util/types

apis.name: isUint8Array(value)
apis.notes: Returns true for Uint8Array and Buffer instances and false for other typed-array views, DataView, ArrayBuffer, and ordinary values.

apis.name: isArrayBuffer(value)
apis.notes: Returns true for ArrayBuffer instances and false for views, Buffer, and ordinary values.

notes: Both `util/types` and `node:util/types` resolve to the same object as `require('util').types`. This module exposes the existing partial util.types predicate surface; it adds the subpath required by Undici's Fetch and WebSocket paths.
